proposal.summary: Implement a focused map runtime system that keeps MapUI synchronized with the current RoomSystem room and floor.
out_of_scope: New map art or UI layout redesign

user_decisions.decision: Proceed through Harness steps automatically and treat the recurring next-step prompt as approval to continue approved-for-implementation units.

decision_log.reason: phases/index.json has no active or blocked phase and NEXT_ACTION.md recommends MapRuntimeSystem.

current_state: Completed. MapRuntimeSystem observes RoomSystem room changes and updates MapUI floor and current-room marker state.
resume_instructions: This phase is complete. Next, start one new Harness unit for Stage1PlayableFlowValidation only if phases/index.json has no in_progress or blocked phase.
next_action: Start Stage1PlayableFlowValidation to validate the playable Stage 1 flow across title, HUD, room movement, interaction, puzzle, event, map, hiding, monster, and game-over systems.
